title: Saul Protects Robin
description: The World Government destroys Ohara, and Robin’s tragedy becomes a direct symbol of its cruelty.
scene: Across pages 13, 14, 15, 16, this part follows Nico Olvia, Nico Robin, Professor Clover, Jaguar D. Saul, Spandam. The World Government destroys Ohara, and Robin’s tragedy becomes a direct symbol of its cruelty.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: I'll hold her back!! Just go!!!

dialogue.speaker: Professor Clover
dialogue.text: Was it because she's a monster!?

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Nico Robin, that's my daughter's dress!!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: She eats too much for a freeloader...

dialogue.speaker: Spandine
dialogue.text: I think... you've got the wrong person...

dialogue.speaker: Nico Olvia
dialogue.text: Are you... Really not my mother?

summary: The World Government destroys Ohara, and Robin’s tragedy becomes a direct symbol of its cruelty.
